km.France: ប្រទេសបារាំង

zh.lifeSummary: Guy II De Ray於1159年出生在法國。他於1173年與N De Chappes在法國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Guy II De Ray于1159年出生在法国。他于1173年与N De Chappes在法国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Ray or Rey, perhaps a pet form of names beginning in Ray or Rey, especially Raymond .

English: nickname from Old French rei ‘king’, denoting someone who behaved in a regal fashion, one with the bearing of a king, or referring to the mock king or lord in festive games and pageants, e.g. at Christmas, May Day, or harvest. Compare Roy and King .

English: nickname from Middle English ræghe (Old English rǣge) ‘female roe deer’ or in northern England more likely northern Middle English rā, raa, rae, ray (Old English rā) ‘roe deer’, perhaps for a timid person or swift runner. Compare Roe .

variants.name: Raymond
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Andre, Camille, Jacques, Lucien, Armand, Francois, Emile, Fernand, Gilles, Laurier, Marcel.
English and French: from the Norman personal name Raimund or Raimond, from ancient Germanic Raginmund, composed of the elements ragin ‘advice, counsel’ + mund ‘protection’. Compare Ramo and Raymo .
Americanized form of Italian Raimondo and German Raimund, cognates of 1 above. Compare Raimond .

variants.name: Reigh
meanings: English (Lancashire): probably a variant of   Ray   or   Rea  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Roe
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English ro(o) ‘roe deer’ (Old English rā). This is the midland and southern form, also found in South Yorkshire and Lancashire. In much of northern England, however, rā remained unrounded and survives as Ray 3.
English: post-medieval variant of Wroe (see Wray ). Wroe may also have been used as a spelling of Roe .
English: post-medieval variant of   Row   (or vice versa); see   Rowe  .

variants.name: Raye
meanings: English: variant of   Ray  .

variants.name: Leray
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Christophe.  Irish Fitzroy.

French: topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or rushing stream, a variant of Ray , with fused masculine definite article le; or a habitational name from Le Ray, the name of several places in various parts of France.

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  ♂ ‘Wondrous’ or ‘enlightenment’.
2  ♀ ‘Fine jade’.

en.lifeSummary: Guy II De Ray was born in 1159, in France. He married N De Chappes in 1173, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Guy II De Ray est né en 1159, à France. Il a épousé N De Chappes en 1173, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Guy II De Ray wurde 1159 in Frankreich geboren. Er hat 1173 in Frankreich N De Chappes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Guy II De Ray è nato il nel 1159 nel Francia. Lui sposato N De Chappes nel 1173, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy II De Rayは1159年にフランスで生まれた。1173年にフランスでN De Chappesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy II De Ray(은)는 1159년 프랑스에서 태어났다. 그는 1173년 프랑스에서 N De Chappes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Guy II De Ray nasceu em 1159, em França. Ele casou-se com N De Chappes em 1173, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Guy II De Ray родился в 1159 г. в местности Франция. Он женился на женщине по имени N De Chappes в 1173 г. в местности Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Guy II De Ray nació en 1159, en Francia. Se casó con N De Chappes en 1173, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.

th.1159–: ปี 1159–ถึงแก่กรรม
th.1160–Female: ปี1160–ถึงแก่กรรม
